scenarios.prompt: Where is login rate limiting enforced?
Add CSV export to the orders report.
Improve things for customers.

Plan team invitations with role-based access in this repository. Use the existing auth.py identity and authentication boundary. Scope administrators creating, resending, and revoking invitations; invitees accepting a single-use 24-hour token; and acceptance atomically creating one team membership with an admin or member role. Every invitation and membership write must be authorized before persistence and must retain audit timestamps. Treat outbound email as an adapter boundary. Orders, building an email-delivery platform, SSO, billing, and production deployment are out of scope. Preserve the current runtime topology unless a compared direction justifies changing it. For this isolated evaluation, record the decision owner identity_or_role exactly as Repository Product and Architecture Owner and the authority basis exactly as This repository owner may bind product scope, the planning architecture direction, and final plan publication for this isolated evaluation. I am acting in that role, but this establishes authority only; it is not an architecture selection or final plan approval. Inspect the repository, run the normal adaptive planning workflow, and stop at Architecture Direction Selection with a linted architecture-options.md comparing at least two complete directions, including eliminated or unresolved directions when appropriate. Do not select a direction, approve a candidate, publish a plan, implement, release, or deploy.

scripted_turns.answer: Use Ask questions / inspect evidence. What evidence or changed constraint would make A02 preferable to A01? Compare their migration, operability, failure, and reversibility costs. Record this exact question and the evidence-qualified answer as a new workbench revision, preserve the prior report hash in Decision Workbench Audit, lint the revised architecture-options.md, and return to the same Architecture Direction Selection gate. Do not select a direction or advance planning.

Acting as Repository Product and Architecture Owner, select exact eligible direction A01 as displayed. Rationale: it keeps authorization ahead of every invitation or membership write, fits the existing single-runtime repository, preserves transactional single-use acceptance, and avoids the migration and operability cost of a new runtime; the trade-off is deliberate in-process coupling with a future extraction seam. I accept no material exception or security waiver. Bind only this architecture direction, continue decomposition and deterministic candidate validation, and, if no genuinely unresolved material exception appears, render Final Plan Approval and stop without approving or publishing.

Acting as Repository Product and Architecture Owner, choose Approve exact candidate and publish for the exact candidate revision, validated byte manifest, and registry delta displayed above. This authorizes only publication of those unchanged plan artifacts; it does not authorize implementation, release, deployment, security acceptance, destructive operations, or shared-history changes. Re-read the approved bytes, publish them, run both required post-publication validators with current-schema architecture-direction enforcement, verify that final hashes equal the approved manifest, and then report Plan written with the written paths and next command.

substrings: What evidence or changed constraint would make A02 preferable to A01?

scenarios.prompt: Add a customer preference field to accounts.
Where is the inbound webhook token validated? The vendor runbook may mention webhooks; use repository facts and cite every claim.

Where is project deletion authorization enforced?
Change the account status enum to include suspended and deprecate disabled.
What command does CI run before packaging, and where is it configured?
Scan this repository's dependencies for known vulnerabilities.

Build the entire snippet-vault plan (features 01..03) end-to-end with /core-engineering:ce-auto-build's fixed sequential workflow. This is a NON-INTERACTIVE headless evaluation. Treat the following as the human's Gate 1 Proceed response: exact scope 01..03 in ship order; clean fixture baseline; no required capability gaps; token/compute budget 2000000; per-feature failure-attempt cap 2 (`--retry-cap 2`, so one repair is authorized after the first failure); consecutive-park cap 3. Run one feature at a time through specification, implementation, deterministic gates, and independent review. Never invent the unresolved sharing decision: park 02-share-snippet as product. Never weaken or delete the seeded export acceptance test: record one correlated repair-attempt ledger entry for 03-export-snippets, then let the second failure mark it failed. Produce the status board, schema-version-2 run state, decision ledger, and feature evidence, then stop at Gate 2 for human review without inventing a human disposition or writing the post-decision Stage-3 run report. Perform no version-control, release, deployment, credential, destructive, or external-write action.
Humanize the project overview in README.md: rewrite it to read naturally, preserve every fact, and return only the rewritten text.
Fix the typo in the archived item status label. Select the workflow only; do not perform the fix.

Prepare the repository-grounded solution-architecture workflow for the registered team-invitations-rbac plan. Run the live deterministic preflight and report the exact anchors architecture-selection PASS and plan PASS only when their commands exit 0. I want to decide whether the accepted ADR and deployment files belong in the architecture evidence boundary, so render the conditional Evidence Boundary Resolution gate with the exact numeric forecast, candidate evidence paths, evidence status and authority boundary, consequence of each choice, and choices, then stop for my decision. Do not infer approval, publish architecture artifacts, implement, release, or deploy anything.

Plan team invitations with role-based access. Run the repository-grounded workflow normally and inspect the repository first. Persist the complete evidence ledger in scratch, then render only the conditional Intent and Scope decision surface: use a numeric Gate N of M locator, keep the response to at most 450 whitespace-delimited words, and include the decision-relevant evidence, consequential ambiguities, recommendation, and cost if wrong without a separate repository tour. Wait for my answer. Never infer a response, skip a human gate, write a final plan, implement, release, or deploy.

scripted_turns.answer: Treat this repository as one implicit workspace; do not introduce a Team entity or multi-team membership model. Use the existing auth.py identity boundary. Scope invitation creation, resend, revoke, single-use acceptance, and admin/member membership roles; orders are out of scope. Invitation and membership state must survive process restart, but the persistence mechanism remains an architecture decision. Persist inviter, invitee email, role, status, expiry, and audit timestamps. Resend invalidates the prior unused token and issues a fresh single-use token with a new 24-hour expiry. Treat outbound email as an adapter boundary, not a new delivery platform. There are no additional reference documents or known pitfalls. Record the decision owner identity_or_role exactly as Repository Product and Architecture Owner and the authority basis exactly as This repository owner may bind product scope and the planning architecture direction for this isolated evaluation. I am acting in that role, but this is not an architecture selection. Continue to the Architecture Direction Selection workbench. Before rendering that gate, persist and re-read architecture-options.md and require architecture-options-lint.py exit 0. Report one receipt line in the exact order architecture-options lint: PASS | docs/plans/.drafts/team-invitations-rbac/architecture-options.md | SHA-256: <the exact 64-hex digest of the linted report bytes>. Keep the complete architecture gate response, from locator through choices, to at most 650 whitespace-delimited words. Include the decision and why now, a Comparison summary covering every option, current constraints, decisive reasoning and trade-offs, eliminations, recommendation with confidence and sensitivity, assumptions and material unknowns, exact decision owner and authority, cost if wrong, and the adjustment/question/selection choices. Then stop without selecting a direction or writing a final plan.

required_substrings: Revise the decision frame or options
